PolicyName: Production resources have no backup policy applied
PolicyDescription: This policy ensures that production resources are protected by an active backup policy. Without backup coverage, essential data is exposed to permanent loss.
RemediationSteps: Attach the resource to an enforced backup policy with a retention window that meets your recovery objectives.

PolicyName: VM backups are failing due to snapshot extension failure
PolicyDescription: This policy identifies persistent Azure VM backup failures where the snapshot extension prevents successful completion, leaving recent recovery points unavailable.
RemediationSteps: Investigate the VM snapshot extension failure and re-run the backup; confirm the guest agent and backup extension are healthy.

PolicyDescription: This policy ensures that all financial data, reports, and audit-relevant records required under SOX are retained with adequate backup and retention controls.
RemediationSteps: Apply the required backup and retention controls to the resource holding SOX-relevant financial data.

PolicyName: Orphaned volumes increase storage costs and operational risk
PolicyDescription: Cloud provider disks and volumes that are not attached to any compute instance continue to accrue storage cost and operational risk.
RemediationSteps: Snapshot then delete unattached volumes that are no longer needed, or reattach them to their intended workload.
